* Source: Headset (USB-C to 3.5mm Headphone Jack Adapter), MICROPHONE (Master Volume), L, volume: 0.250. Timing signal peak level -18.6 dBFS, measurement signal peak level -18.5 dBFS
* Format: 1M Log Swept Sine, 1 sweep at -12.0 dBFS using an acoustic timing reference

* REW Settings:
*  C-weighting compensation: Off
*  Target level: 75.0 dB
* Note: ; Delay -0.0225 ms (-7.7 mm, -0.3 in) using estimated IR delay relative to Acoustic reference played from HEADPHONE L with no timing offset Clock adjustment: -15.6 ppm
